title: Axial bearing bridge for ball ramp
abstract: A ball ramp plate and a ball ramp assembly including the ball ramp plate are provided. The ball ramp plate comprises a stamped metal plate formed with ramped ball pockets on a first side at a ball ramp pitch radius and a thrust bearing support on a second side of the plate. The thrust bearing support has a first support surface at a first pitch radius greater than the ball ramp pitch radius and a second support surface at a second pitch radius less than the ball ramp pitch radius.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A ball ramp plate comprising: a plate with ramped ball pockets formed on a first side at a ball ramp pitch radius; and a thrust bearing support on a second side of the plate having a first support surface at a first pitch radius greater than the ball ramp pitch radius and a second support surface at a second pitch radius less than the ball ramp pitch radius, wherein the first support surface and the second support surface are integrally formed with the plate. 2. The ball ramp plate of claim 1, wherein the first support surface and the second support surface are coplanar. 3. The ball ramp plate of claim 1, wherein the plate is a stamped metal plate. 4. The ball ramp plate of claim 1, wherein the plate is formed from chromium steel. 5. A ball ramp assembly comprising: a dynamic ball ramp plate with ramped first ball pockets formed on a first side of the plate at a ball ramp pitch radius and a thrust bearing support on a second side of the plate; a static ball ramp plate with ramped second ball pockets corresponding in number with the first ball pockets, the static ball ramp plate and the dynamic ball ramp plate coaxially aligned so that the first and second ball pockets are opposed; a plurality of rolling elements disposed in the opposing first and second ball pockets; 

 a first thrust bearing disposed on a first support surface of the thrust bearing support at a first pitch radius greater than the ball ramp pitch radius; and a second thrust bearing disposed on a second support surface of the thrust bearing support at a second pitch radius less than the ball ramp pitch radius. 6. The ball ramp assembly of claim 5, wherein the dynamic ball ramp plate is a stamped metal plate. 7. The ball ramp assembly of claim 5, wherein the static ball ramp plate is a stamped metal plate. 8. The ball ramp assembly of claim 5, wherein the first support surface and the second support surface are integrally formed with the plate. 9. The ball ramp assembly of claim 6, wherein the first support surface and the second support surface are coplanar. 10. The ball ramp assembly of claim 5, wherein the first axial bearing comprises rolling elements disposed in a first bearing cage, and the second axial bearing comprises rolling elements disposed in a second bearing cage.
